summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Dat Pack Co. Quotation Calculator. All major features are functional - client modal, calculator sections, calculations, save/export, dark mode, history drawer, repeat order.

ui_bugs.issue: Section accordion cannot be expanded by clicking on text content or via querySelector JS. Only works via data-testid='section-card-section-N'. Not a blocking issue - sections open fine when clicked normally in browser.

issues: Custom cursor dot (large white circle) is distracting and appears as a floating element over content in screenshots - may overlap interactive elements visually

critical_code_review_comments: All critical functionality works correctly. No blocking issues found.
UPS calculation correctly computes floor(masterL/flatL) * floor(masterW/flatW) = 9 for 700x500/200x150
Paper Cost auto-calculates TOTAL PAPER COST from gross sheets, weight per sheet, GSM, and paper rate
Grand Total with GST populates correctly in sticky summary bar and Section 8
Supabase save works - quotation IDs generated (QT-20260331-XXXX format), saved indicator shows in header
History drawer shows saved quotations count
test_credentials: No auth required - direct Supabase anon key access
seed_data_creation: 2 test quotations created in Supabase for Acme Packaging Ltd. during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Key test flow: load page -> click New Quote for Acme Packaging -> fill job specs (job name, qty, flat size) -> paper specs auto-fills with defaults -> layout section shows UPS auto-calc -> use data-testid='section-card-section-N' to expand sections -> paper cost fills with paper rate -> grand total calculates. History, dark mode, snapshot, export buttons all work. Repeat order toggle visible in Section 9.

features_tested.new_client_form: PASS - shows CLIENT NAME, PHONE, EMAIL fields with Create Client button
features_tested.header_shows_client_save_buttons: PASS - shows client name, QT-ID, Saved Xs ago, History/Switch Client/New Quote
features_tested.section5_printing: PASS - section opens with TOTAL IMPRESSIONS, CLICK CHARGE, LAM RATE fields
features_tested.snapshot_save: PASS - saves to Supabase with QT-YYYYMMDD-XXXX ID
features_tested.repeat_order_toggle: PASS - visible with 'This is a Repeat Order' toggle switch
features_tested.calculated_editable_fields: PASS - pencil icon appears on hover over calculated fields (UPS, net sheets, etc.)
